case_title: BARNES FINANCIAL SERVICES VS. LISA LOWERY

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARNES FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT LOWERY, LISA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOWERY, LISA $2,322.24 PRINCIPAL, $80.64 INTEREST, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,506.88, TOTAL $ 2,506.88 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: WILKS, ROBERT SUBSTITUTED FOR MOONEY, MICHAEL ARTHUR AS ATTORNEY FOR BARNES FINANCIAL SERVICES
